a: SET's vision is to become Taiwan's most sustainable media company. Rooted in the power of mass media, we integrate technological innovation and sustainability strategies into our operations and governance, advancing ESG and building a resilient Taiwanese media enterprise.

Low-Carbon Transformation
Having traveled across Taiwan and the world, SET deeply understands the importance of environmental protection. Our goal of 'green operations' reduces our environmental impact, while our media influence transforms environmental conservation into a shared social mission.

A Diverse & Inclusive Work Environment
SET believes that the key to sustainable development lies in a friendly workplace and a caring corporate environment. We embrace people-centered talent development and leverage technology to accelerate digital transformation, uphold professional excellence, and foster an inclusive, resilient media organization.

AI FIRST
As 'Taiwan's TV Station,' SET strives to create and share quality Taiwanese content and values—letting the world see the best of Taiwan. As the 'Fourth Estate,' media bears responsibility for truth, public affairs reporting, and safeguarding public interest. Guided by our 'AI FIRST' strategy, we stay ahead of technological change while holding firm to professionalism, quality, and positive energy.
6 hybrid electric vehicles now deployed for greener news coverage.
Studio LED lighting saves NT$1.62M in electricity and cuts 178.6 tonnes of CO₂ per year.
Paperless e-documents save 650 reams of paper per year—equivalent to protecting 91 trees.
Staff accumulate 240 million steps per year (≈200 laps around Taiwan), reducing 34.3 tonnes of CO₂.
Disposable tableware and plastic bags banned in staff canteens, keeping 218,000 waste items out of the environment each year.

International conservation productions including Asian Cat Renaissance, Art in the Warzone, and My Animal Classmates document endangered species; the 'Ecological Story Train' brings conservation education to campuses.
From Adventure King to I Like to Play to One Night in the Wild, SET has won numerous Golden Bell Awards.
SET's outstanding governance has earned it the top 'Consumer Ideal Brand' award for consecutive years and the 'Happy Enterprise Gold Award'.
SET champions 9 of the UN's 17 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) as the foundation of its ESG vision—becoming a force for sustainability and co-creating a better, greener Taiwan.

a:
Producing humanitarian reporting that fulfills media's social responsibility
Media responsibility is the soul of governance! From warzone reporting to cultural documentation, SET uses content to convey truth, goodness, and beauty — inspiring society to see a better possibility.
